nasb.text: The sons of Zebulun according to their families: of Sered, the family of the Seredites; of Elon, the family of the Elonites; of Jahleel, the family of the Jahleelites.

esv.text: The sons of Zebulun, according to their clans: of Sered, the clan of the Seredites; of Elon, the clan of the Elonites; of Jahleel, the clan of the Jahleelites.

cnv.text: 西布倫的子孫，按著家族，屬西烈的，有西烈家族；屬以倫的，有以倫家族；屬雅利的，有雅利家族。

ccb.text: 西布伦的子孙有西烈族、以伦族和雅利族，
